author: abcjs-music
description: Render music sheets directly from code blocks using ABC music notation via abcjs.

manifest.author: Til Blechschmidt
manifest.description: Obsidian plugin which renders ABC music notation from code blocks using the `abc` language specifier.
manifest.name: ABC Music Notation

name: ABC Music Notation

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* enable swing feature by @sensn in https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/58

## New Contributors
* @sensn made their first contribution in https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/58

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.5.1...1.6.0
releases.name: v1.6.0

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bump esbuild from 0.17.3 to 0.25.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/56
* fixed bug where default was altered when render was initiated by @briandemant in https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/57

## New Contributors
* @briandemant made their first contribution in https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/57

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1
releases.name: v1.5.1

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* converted the build process to use esbuild instead of rollup
* update abcjs to v6.4.4, which includes bufixes for reported issues


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
- Audio playback. Simply tap the score in Preview mode to play. Thanks @SimplGy !
- Updating abcjs to v6.2.2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
Updating abcjs library to v6.2.0, which has improved support for octave

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: alensiljak
releases.description:
Updating dependent libraries, including abcjs to the latest v6.1.6.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/abcjs-music/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.0.7...1.1.0

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update abcjs to version 6.0.3 for tablature support by @TilBlechschmidt in https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7
releases.name: Update abcjs for tablature support

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for passing custom options to renderAbc by @TilBlechschmidt in https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/18

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6
releases.name: Support for custom options

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Modified to work with Live Preview by @wanagel in https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/15

## New Contributors
* @wanagel made their first contribution in https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/pull/15

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5
releases.name: Enable LiveView compatibility

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description: Previously not all music code blocks were rendered when exporting a PDF. This is now fixed thanks to @stephengrice! Additionally, all dependencies have been update to their latest version to cover a few CVEs that popped up.
releases.name: Fix PDF bugs and update dependencies

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description:
This update includes changes from PR #3 which adapt the color of the notes and staff to the current themes text color.

Thanks to @anthonyamar!
releases.name: Adapt color to theme

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description: This release fixes the identifier mismatch between the [plugin list](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/blob/master/community-plugins.json) and the [plugin manifest](https://github.com/TilBlechschmidt/obsidian-plugin-abcjs/blob/master/manifest.json) which prevented it from being installed. Whoopsie.
releases.name: Fix identifier mismatch

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description: This release changes the language name from `abc` to `music-abc` in accordance with other Markdown based tooling that uses abcjs.
releases.name: Change language name

releases.author: TilBlechschmidt
releases.description: First version of the plugin which supports the basic functionality and styling via CSS.
releases.name: Initial release
